title: Pure Beta on Forge
description: A lightweight Beta replica for playing newer Forge mods on older beta versions
body:
# ![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b11f1a7dd7e41e2348519e060793771473f072b.jpeg)
*A lightweight Minecraft Beta replica for playing newer Forge mods on older beta versions*
## What This Modpack Does Pure Beta on Forge creates a complete Beta experience on modern Forge, allowing you to: - 💎 Experience authentic Beta 1.7.3 world generation, mechanics, and visuals - Forget about new features like deepslate, enchanting, villagers, etc. - 💎 Play with modern Forge mods in a classic Beta environment - Barebones setup for maximized mod compatibility - 💎 Customize your experience with [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) - old boat launching, instant bows, etc. all easily toggleable ## What Makes This Pack Unique > | Other Beta Modpacks | Pure Beta on Forge | > | --- | --- | > | ❌ Only available for Fabric | ✅ Available for Forge | > | ❌ Often mix in modern elements | ✅ Actively removes non-Beta features | > | ❌ Don't work when you add mods | ✅ Highly compatible | > | ❌ Often bloated with unnecessary mods | ✅ Lightweight with minimal mods | > ## Beta Customization Options > Fine-tune your experience through [Nostalgic Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) settings: > 1. Open your game menu > 2. Click "Mods" > 3. Select "Nostalgic Tweaks" > 4. Adjust settings to make your game more Alpha-like or more modern > ## WORLD SETUP INFORMATION > When creating a new world: > 1. Set world type to "**Moderner Beta**" > 2. Set "**Generate Structures**" to **OFF** > 3. (Optional: The deserts in default generation are mostly limited to small splotches of sand. It is my recommendation to use Beta 1.8 generation, but if you insist, then I suggest large biomes, which feels more normal) Customize > World Preset > Beta Custom > Beta Large Biomes. > 4. (Optional) Disable Broadcast Advancements in Chat gamerule on world creation.
